title: Rich Flaky Egyptian Olive Flatbread
description: A buttery, flaky flatbread infused with savory pitted black olives, perfect for a romantic date night and lowcarb, diabeticfriendly meal.

ingredients.name: pitted black olives, sliced
ingredients.notes: fresh or frozen, thawed if frozen

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, whisk together almond flour, tapioca starch, baking powder, xanthan gum, and salt until well combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk the beaten egg, olive oil, and warm water until smooth.
Pour the wet mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until a sticky dough forms.
Fold in the sliced black olives, ensuring they are evenly distributed.
Transfer the dough to the prepared baking sheet and gently press it into a flat, 10x8 inch rectangle. Split into 4 equal portions by drawing a line with a knife.
Bake for 12–15 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown and the surface feels firm.
Remove from the oven, let cool slightly, then cut into four equal servings. Garnish with fresh parsley if desired and serve warm.
